case_title: MELODY BROCKHAGE VS. MCKESSON CORPORATION INDIVIDUALLY AND D/B/A et al

docket_entries.description: NTC OF RELATED CASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF BROCKHAGE, MELODY

PRODUCTS LIABILITY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BROCKHAGE, MELODY AS TO DEFENDANT MCKESSON CORPORATION INDIVIDUALLY AND D/B/A NORTHSTAR RX LLC, A DELAWARE CORPORATION FIRST DATA BANK, A MISSOURI CORPORATION WYETH PHARMACEUTICALS, INC., INDIVIDUALLY AND D/B/A ESI LEDERLE, INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION PFIZER, INC. A DELAWARE CORPORATION SCHWARZ PHARMA, INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION SCHWARZ PHARMA AG, A FOREIGN CORPORATION UCB GMBH D/B/A SCHWARZ PHARMA AG, A FOREIGN CORPORATION ALAVEN PHARMACEUTICAL LLC, A DELAWARE CORPORATION MORTON GROVE PHARMACEUTICALS, INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION DOES 1 THROUGH 100 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JAN-21-2011 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-18-2010 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JAN-06-2011 COMPLEX LITIGATION ASSIGNMENT REQUESTED BY FILING PARTIES; FEE INCLUDED IN FILING FEE
